title: Unified 4-Indicator Buy/Sell System (60pt62, PMO exact)
thesis_bullets: TradingView indicator: Unified 4-Indicator Buy/Sell System (60pt62, PMO exact) by seantrading2.

use these signal alongside price momentum oscillator, use the settings 10,10,8 for the PMO take the signal as long as you are on the right side of pmo, longs above 0 shorts below 0, entry at open of next candle, stops to high or low of signal candle and take profit at 1rr.

if you get a win, don't chase the following moves even if they are all the right setup, just wait for a new hma color to show use these signal alongside price momentum oscillator, use the settings 10,10,8 for the PMO take the signal as long as you are on the right side of pmo, longs above 0 shorts below 0, entry at open of next candle, stops to high or low of signal candle and take profit at 1

if you get a win, don't chase the following moves even if they are all the right setup, just wait for a new hma color to show Source URL: https://www.tradingview.com/script/DMtUM2Xn-Unified-4-Indicator-Buy-Sell-System-60pt62-PMO-exact/.

hypotheses.statement: BTC continuation edge appears when signal alignment persists on 1h.
hypotheses.rationale: Research and indicator mentions converge on trend-continuation logic with confirmation filters.
hypotheses.falsifiable_test: Backtest BTC on 1h: require >=55% win rate and positive expectancy over 200+ trades; reject if unmet.

strategy_heuristics_used: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.
Separate signal logic from execution logic to reduce confounded performance attribution.
Require risk gating concepts before scaling complexity in entry or exit rules.
automation_heuristics_used: Keep human approval checkpoints for high-impact automation and deployment transitions.
Enforce deterministic session gating before any live-capable execution pathway is enabled.
Invest first in telemetry for risk, latency, and execution drift before adding new automation features.
